---
title: "My Name"       # the title of the index page
about:
  # template types
  #template: jolla
  template: trestles
  #template: broadside
  # image details
  image: files/profile-pic.jpg
  image-width: 20em            # to adjust size
  image-shape: round           # to make round
  
  links:
    # add others
    - icon: linkedin
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/school/claremont-mckenna-college/posts/?feedView=all
    - icon: twitter-x
      href: https://x.com/CMCnews

---

I am a ... blah blah

## Education

Institution | City, State
B.A in Degree | start - finish

## Experience

Organization A | Title | start - finish

Organization b | Title | start - finish
